layers.name: api
layers.description: FastAPI backend services, routers, and business logic

layers.name: web
layers.description: React components, pages, and UI logic

components.name: billing
components.description: Handles Stripe payments, subscription management, credit packages, quota enforcement, and billing history. Critical for revenue.

components.name: authentication
components.description: User authentication (email/password, Google OAuth), JWT token management, role-based access control (RBAC). Critical for security.

components.name: websocket
components.description: Real-time WebSocket connections, presence management, message broadcasting. Critical for live translation UX.

components.name: stt
components.description: STT routing (5 providers: Speechmatics, Google, Azure, Soniox, OpenAI), language-based provider selection, streaming manager, connection pooling. Critical for core product functionality.

components.name: mt
components.description: MT routing (4 providers: DeepL, Google, Amazon, OpenAI GPT-4o), language-pair optimization, translation caching, Arabic throttling.

components.name: admin
components.description: Cost analytics, multi-speaker analytics, budget tracking, user management, audit logs, system settings.

components.name: frontend-core
components.description: Room page, authentication pages, layout components, WebSocket hooks, i18n integration.

components.name: frontend-admin
components.description: Admin panel UI components, cost charts, user tables, metrics dashboard.

components.name: tests
components.description: Unit, integration, and E2E tests. Test complexity is not tracked as tests are intentionally simple.
